text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* I have won the Satsuki Sho. However, I've
veered off the route Parcae calculated for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Parcae's numbers have changed. My loss
differential for the Derby now stands at a mere
three centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
However, the gap has not reached zero. My next
goal is the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I must find the necessary variable that can reduce
the gap to zero.
